description: Refactor the monolithic 'robot_arm.py' file into a clean Python package structure at 'robot/' within the project at '~/PycharmProjects/robot_control'. Break the 'RobotArm' class into four focused modules using composition: 'robot/kinematics.py' (class Kinematics), 'robot/trajectory.py' (class TrajectoryPlanner), 'robot/safety.py' (class SafetyMonitor), and 'robot/arm.py' (class RobotArm). The 'robot/__init__.py' file must export all classes. Update 'tests/test_robot.py' to import 'RobotArm' from the new package and ensure all 12 existing tests pass. Do not change the logic, math, or test assertions.
